title: Zombify Horses
description: You can now transform horses into zombie and skeleton horses with the help of withering
body:
Ever wanted to obtain zombie horses in survival? Well now you can!

By splashing a horse with a potion of withering and feeding it a poisonous potato, you can now zombify it. You can also create a skeleton horse by shearing it while its affected with wither during a thunderstorm.

as a bonus, you are now able to ride zombie horses!
